allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit with project documentation and configuration

Sets up the Moria C64/C128 port repository with README, architecture
guidelines, Claude Code configuration, and development conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive build plan for Moria C64/C128 port

Covers memory map, data compression strategy, tiered loading,
10-phase implementation plan, and architectural decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace hallucinated KickAss.Unit with actual testing approach

KickAss.Unit does not exist. Testing now uses two verified methods:
- Kick Assembler built-in .assert directives \(assembly-time\)
- VICE headless runtime tests \(x64sc -console -nativemonitor + BRK\)

Updated BUILDPLAN.md testing strategy, build commands, and risk
register. Updated CLAUDE.md testing references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
